synthetic_flux_check.interpretation: Channel sums are positive in the declared clockwise direction. Region net export is zero for uniform clockwise circulation because each two-node aspect has one incoming and one outgoing boundary edge.

observable_semantics.return_channel_sign: positive in declared clockwise edge orientation

initialization_resolution.two_equal_canonical_ring_bumps: canonical_ring_bump applied twice with equal A and kappa at lane.bump_centers, followed by conserved simplex projection
initialization_resolution.canonical_ring_bump_plus_small_local_sou: canonical_ring_bump applied first, then source/sink modulation is added, followed by one conserved simplex projection
initialization_resolution.K: resolve base_lane U2, initialize uniform closed-substrate masks, then apply zero_sum_kick at kick_step
initialization_resolution.source_sink_modulation_audit: record pre-projection sum and projection delta
initialization_resolution.kick_audit: record pre-projection sum and projection delta; K_reversed applies reversed masks to labels and kick direction

control_notes.shuffled_conductance: initial_fixture_base_conductance is uniform in grc9v3_ported_ring_v1, so shuffling that surface is non-informative unless conductance heterogeneity is added; channel_mask_assignment is the first informative shuffled control
control_notes.simple_unported_ring_reversal: simple_unported_ring_v1 is an analysis/control fixture; reversal controls should use grc9v3_ported_ring_v1 unless explicitly added here

default_edge_properties.note: explicit defaults used when an edge omits optional transport labels
